caption:
Sofwave results at 90 days. The jawline tells the story.

This patient wanted to address early jowling and loss of definition along the jawline and submental area. She wasn't ready for surgery—and after seeing her Sofwave results, she won't need to be.

Treatment: One Sofwave session targeting the lower face, jawline, and under-chin.
Downtime: Zero. She went to dinner that evening.

Day 1: Subtle warmth, mild tightness.
Day 30: Noticeable firming along the jaw.
Day 90: Visible lift. Sharper jawline definition. Smoother neck contour.

And her results will continue improving through month 6 as collagen remodeling completes.

One treatment. No surgery. No needles. Just ultrasound energy doing what it does best—rebuilding your skin's structural foundation.

See what Sofwave can do for you. Book a consultation.
mediaDescription: Before and after profile view showing jawline definition improvement at 90 days. Professional clinical photography with consistent angle, lighting, and positioning. Side profile to highlight the contouring effect. Rani branded frame.
